prose: **TEMPO frontier-orbital gap** — DFT, tier standard (B3LYP/def2-TZVP with density‐fitting (RIJK)) in PySCF; single‐point on the user‐supplied `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/tempo/tempo.xyz` geometry, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 2.
